calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-30-2011 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor. Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioners Ci Hao Luo and Yu Xian Wang (father/mother) present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the two minors Hong Zhao Luo and Xuan Qi Luo, were placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to Darren Hong Zhao Luo and Suki Xuan Qi Luo.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
